title: Portfolio Recipes: How can I edit the recipe populating portfolio from it's projects?
excerpt: How can I edit the automatic recipes that populate portfolio columns from the project boards I’ve added? I have a project template that we use, but it doesn’t auto populate the fields in the portfolio board.

posts.author: AimeeDivico (Aimee Divico)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I edit the automatic recipes that populate portfolio columns from the project boards I’ve added? I have a project template that we use, but it doesn’t auto populate the fields in the portfolio board.
